response.justification: Strong generalist with ~15 years of full-stack engineering experience and recent exposure to agentic workflows and MCP at re:cinq, but the resume does not demonstrate the 8+ years of AI-driven solution development the role requires. Vector databases, RAG architectures, evaluation pipelines, and production GenAI on major cloud platforms are not evidenced. A screening call could clarify the depth of the recent AI-agent work, but on paper this is a borderline fit.
strengths: Long, polyglot engineering track record with TypeScript/Node and AWS CDK experience
Recent hands-on work with MCP code generators and agentic workflow frameworks
Demonstrated technical leadership via workshops, talks, and mentoring activities
concerns: No explicit RAG, vector database, or LLM evaluation/observability experience listed
AI-focused work appears to be ~1 year, far short of the required 8+ years in AI
Limited evidence of customer-facing forward-deployed or discovery-leadership experience

key_factors.factor: Insufficient years building production AI systems
Missing RAG / vector DB / LLM evaluation expertise
Recent MCP and agentic workflow exposure at re:cinq
